description: AshAgent role -> writable-path mapping. Single source of truth for write-permission enforcement. Harness-neutral: consumed by ashagent/core, surfaced to humans via docs. Paths are repo-relative glob prefixes matched against the normalized (forward-slash) file path.

EngineDev.description: Engine runtime, RHI, rendering, shaders, third-party libraries.

GameDev.description: Sandbox validation app and future Game project.

QA.description: Verification role. No source write access; works through validation scripts, reference frames, and requirement-status transitions.
